titleStmt.title: SII 15.169: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 169. (B.K. No. 94 of 1929-30.) KOLHĀR, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab standing before the house of Bhōjanāyaka.
This is dated Śaka 1145, Subhānu, Dvitīya Bhādrapada śu. 5, Friday, corresponding to 1223 A.D., September 1.

It registers a gift of land and money income made by the Mahājanas and the four chief Prabhus of the agrahāra Kōlāra, to the god Mallikārjuna installed by Kuruba Sēṇiga Dāsagauḍa, Śivaśaktiguru and Kottaḷis of the village. It also records gifts made by the Five Hundred Svāmis of Ayyāvaḷe and Mummuridaṇḍas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī vijayāścābhyudayaśca © . namastuṁga śi
raścuṁbi chatracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya seṁbhavē . śrī ramaṇīsanuṁ girisutanumoppuvuṣēṣaneṁba
nīrējanētranuṁ niṭaḷalōcananuṁ jagadēkavaṁdyanunēridavakṣa pakṣi
riddesasuvāhanaroludu māḷke kōlārada mājanaṁgaḷabhivāṁchi
tamaṁ sasiśūryyaruḷḷinaṁ . svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁThe verse is faulty.
pratāpacakravartti siṁghaṇadēvarasara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
vriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ dēvēṁdragiriya nelevīḍinoḷu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamireyire . mattaṁ śaka
varusada 1145 deneya svabhānu sauvaccharada dvitīya bhādrapada su
ddha 5 sukravāradaṁdu śrīmatu sarvvanamasyadagrahāraṁ dakṣiṇavāra
ṇāsi kōlārada Asēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ Alliya nālku modala prabhugaḷuṁ taṁma
makaḷu kuruba sēṇiga dāsagauḍa sivasaktigurugaḷuṁ samasta kottaḷigaḷuṁ pratiṣṭayaṁ
māḍisida śrī mallikārjjunadēvara Aṁgabhōga khaṁḍisphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakaṁ pāda pūjeya
koṁṇḍu hiriya haḷḷadiṁ paḍuva nārahanāladiṁ baḍaga karuvageyiṁ mūḍa veḍḍeya ge
yiṁ teṁka mattareraḍuṁ caribeṟikiyamoḷage Iḍukabaṁ vūraḍayara kēriya nai
rityada gōṁṭinalu Ēḷu kaiyagala hanikaiya nīḷada maneyu magga sahita sarvva namasya
vāgi Ā caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ koṭṭaru Ā dēvarige dāsagauḍanuṁ kottaḷigaḷuṁ tāvu
koṭṭa Āya koḍagūsina maduvage haṇa hāga maruvattiga Aḍaṁ bēḷa vīḷayadē
varige Aḍake 12 Ele 24 jīyage Aḍake 6 Ele 12 vokkalalu caitreke bēḷa payitra
kka hāga saṁkramāṇadalu bēḷa Ayyūvaḷaya Ainūrvva svāmigaḷuṁ sakala muṁmaridaṁ
ḍaṁgaḷu koṭṭa Āyasaṭṭuga bhatta Ele hēṟiṁge 100 hēṟiṁge 50 gāṇigaru koṭṭa [Āya]
soṭige yaṇne koṭṭaḷiyalu nola parvvadalu kaḷi 1 vāra 1 [Ā jī]yaru mū
ṟu modaluṁ koṭṭa Aya gātrake Ele 100 bilamūnūrbbaru koṭṭa Āya madu
vege hāga hiḍivāḍu moḷavina kalige 10 kāyakalige heḍagege māna 1
māṇigaḍeganūre kottaḷigaḷu koṭṭa Āya koḍagūsina maduvege haṇa hāga maṟuvattige
[A]ḍaṁ bēḷa paitrake bēḷe pavitrake hāga saṁkramāṇakke bēḷe yī dēvara sāsanadaliṭṭa ke
yyu mana magga Āya dāya nela nēsaṟuḷḷanaṁ salalu maṁgaḷa mahā srī .
Digital edition of SII 15.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
